name: @hasna/sessions
description: Search and sync AI coding sessions (Claude, Codex, Gemini) — unified SQLite index with full-text search

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun run build:cli && bun run build:mcp && bun run build:server && bun run build:lib && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist
scripts.build:cli: bun build src/cli/index.tsx --outdir dist/cli --target bun --packages external
scripts.build:mcp: bun build src/mcp/index.ts --outdir dist/mcp --target bun --packages external
scripts.build:server: bun build src/server/index.ts --outdir dist/server --target bun --packages external
scripts.build:lib: bun build src/index.ts src/storage.ts --outdir dist --target bun --packages external
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run typecheck && bun test && bun run build

author: Hasna <andrei@hasna.com>
